case_title: JEREMIAH F. HALLISEY VS. FEDERAL EXPRESS CORPORATION

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-03-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-03-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
